messages.content:
Question: Which store earned the most revenue in USD from Brucqe Maginnis' song 'Street Hype' across all countries?

Available databases: tracks_database, sales_database

Available schema:
Database: tracks_database (sqlite)
  Table: tracks — track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
Database: sales_database (duckdb)
  Table: sales — sale_id, track_id, country, store, units_sold, revenue_usd

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"database": "tracks_database", "query_type": "sql", "query": "SELECT * FROM tracks WHERE title LIKE '%Street Hype%' OR artist LIKE '%Brucqe Maginnis%' OR artist LIKE '%Bruce Maginnis%' OR title LIKE '%Brucqe Maginnis%' OR title LIKE '%Bruce Maginnis%'"}

messages.name: query_db
messages.content:
Query successful. Full dataset saved to env['data_1'] for use in execute_python.
Preview:
[{"track_id": 7, "source_id": 2, "source_track_id": "MBox28675636-HH", "title": "Bruce Maginnis - Sttreet Hype", "artist": null, "album": "Groove City", "year": "05", "length": 177, "language": "English"}, {"track_id": 4122, "source_id": 5, "source_track_id": 10609996, "title": "Street Hype", "artist": "Brucqe Maginnis", "album": "Groove City", "year": 2005, "length": 177000, "language": "English"}, {"track_id": 4628, "source_id": 3, "source_track_id": "46130411MB-01", "title": "Street Hype - Groove City", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis", "album": null, "year": "'05", "length": 2.95, "language": "English"}, {"track_id": 13758, "source_id": 1, "source_track_id": "WoM21220012", "title": "StreetH ype (Groove City)", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis", "album": "Groove City", "year": 2005, "length": null, "language": "02:57"}, {"track_id": 14080, "source_id": 4, "source_track_id": "149437-A02", "title": "011-Street Hype", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis", "album": "Groove City (2005)", "year": null, "length": "2m 57sec", "language": "Eng."}]

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"query_type": "sql", "query": "SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (7, 4122, 4628, 13758, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC", "database": "sales_database"}

messages.name: query_db
messages.content:
Query successful. Full dataset saved to env['data_2'] for use in execute_python.

question: Which store earned the most revenue in USD from Brucqe Maginnis' song 'Street Hype' across all countries?
